text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: It's time for the Kokura Kinen, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
You know, I went to pray at Dazaifu<n>Tenmangu
right before the race.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It's where the great scholar<n>Sugawara no
Michizane is enshrined.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
That makes it one of the two most<n>sacred sites in
Fukuoka, so praying<n>there should really pay off!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: You really don't know? It's so<n>famous, though...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Well then, I think I have a pretty good<n>idea on my
hands. If I manage to get<n>through this race...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Let's go there to celebrate! Hehe!<n>Now I'm even
more fired up to win!
